'''âj-f-h-dh''' ('''kajafhedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:osteointegrate|osteointegrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osteointegrate|osteointegrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-h-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajafhedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijafhedhoko|thijafhedhoko]] || [[word:jijafhedhoko|jijafhedhoko]] || [[word:shijafhedhoko|shijafhedhoko]] || [[word:kijafhedhoko|kijafhedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujafhedhoko|thuthujafhedhoko]] || [[word:jujujafhedhoko|jujujafhedhoko]] || [[word:shushujafhedhoko|shushujafhedhoko]] || [[word:kukujafhedhoko|kukujafhedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujafhedhoko|thujafhedhoko]] || [[word:jujafhedhoko|jujafhedhoko]] || [[word:shujafhedhoko|shujafhedhoko]] || [[word:kujafhedhoko|kujafhedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojafhedhoko|thojafhedhoko]] || [[word:jojafhedhoko|jojafhedhoko]] || [[word:shojafhedhoko|shojafhedhoko]] || [[word:kojafhedhoko|kojafhedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojafhedhoko|thojafhedhoko]] || [[word:jojafhedhoko|jojafhedhoko]] || [[word:shojafhedhoko|shojafhedhoko]] || [[word:kojafhedhoko|kojafhedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjafhedhoko|thĂŠjafhedhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjafhedhoko|jĂŠjafhedhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjafhedhoko|shĂŠjafhedhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjafhedhoko|kĂŠjafhedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajafhedhoko|thathajafhedhoko]] || [[word:jajajafhedhoko|jajajafhedhoko]] || [[word:shashajafhedhoko|shashajafhedhoko]] || [[word:kakajafhedhoko|kakajafhedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajafhedhoko|thajafhedhoko]] || [[word:jajafhedhoko|jajafhedhoko]] || [[word:shajafhedhoko|shajafhedhoko]] || [[word:kajafhedhoko|kajafhedhoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
